q: In which book of the Bible is this verse found?
verse: “In the beginning God created the heaven and the earth.”

q: In which book of the Bible is this verse found?
verse: “And God said, Let there be light: and there was light.”

q: In which book of the Bible is this verse found?
verse: “And the LORD God formed man of the dust of the ground.”

q: In which book of the Bible is this verse found?
verse: “Thou shalt have no other gods before me.”

q: In which book of the Bible is this verse found?
verse: “Be strong and of a good courage; be not afraid, neither be thou dismayed.”

q: In which book of the Bible is this verse found?
verse: “The LORD is my shepherd; I shall not want.”

q: In which book of the Bible is this verse found?
verse: “Be still, and know that I am God.”

q: In which book of the Bible is this verse found?
verse: “Thy word is a lamp unto my feet, and a light unto my path.”

q: In which book of the Bible is this verse found?
verse: “I will lift up mine eyes unto the hills, from whence cometh my help.”

q: In which book of the Bible is this verse found?
verse: “Trust in the LORD with all thine heart; and lean not unto thine own understanding.”

q: In which book of the Bible is this verse found?
verse: “The fear of the LORD is the beginning of wisdom.”

q: In which book of the Bible is this verse found?
verse: “A friend loveth at all times, and a brother is born for adversity.”

q: In which book of the Bible is this verse found?
verse: “For unto us a child is born, unto us a son is given.”

q: In which book of the Bible is this verse found?
verse: “But they that wait upon the LORD shall renew their strength.”

q: In which book of the Bible is this verse found?
verse: “For I know the thoughts that I think toward you, thoughts of peace, and not of evil.”

q: In which book of the Bible is this verse found?
verse: “My God hath sent his angel, and hath shut the lions' mouths.”

q: In which book of the Bible is this verse found?
verse: “Now the LORD had prepared a great fish to swallow up Jonah.”

q: In which book of the Bible is this verse found?
verse: “Blessed are the peacemakers: for they shall be called the children of God.”

q: In which book of the Bible is this verse found?
verse: “But seek ye first the kingdom of God, and his righteousness.”

q: In which book of the Bible is this verse found?
verse: “Come unto me, all ye that labour and are heavy laden, and I will give you rest.”

q: In which book of the Bible is this verse found?
verse: “Come ye after me, and I will make you to become fishers of men.”

q: In which book of the Bible is this verse found?
verse: “For unto you is born this day in the city of David a Saviour, which is Christ the Lord.”

q: In which book of the Bible is this verse found?
verse: “In the beginning was the Word, and the Word was with God, and the Word was God.”

q: In which book of the Bible is this verse found?
verse: “For God so loved the world, that he gave his only begotten Son.”

q: In which book of the Bible is this verse found?
verse: “And ye shall know the truth, and the truth shall make you free.”

q: In which book of the Bible is this verse found?
verse: “Jesus saith unto him, I am the way, the truth, and the life.”

q: In which book of the Bible is this verse found?
verse: “For all have sinned, and come short of the glory of God.”

q: In which book of the Bible is this verse found?
verse: “For the wages of sin is death; but the gift of God is eternal life.”

q: In which book of the Bible is this verse found?
verse: “And we know that all things work together for good to them that love God.”

q: In which book of the Bible is this verse found?
verse: “And now abideth faith, hope, charity, these three; but the greatest of these is charity.”

q: In which book of the Bible is this verse found?
verse: “But the fruit of the Spirit is love, joy, peace, longsuffering, gentleness, goodness, faith.”

q: In which book of the Bible is this verse found?
verse: “For by grace are ye saved through faith; and that not of yourselves: it is the gift of God.”

q: In which book of the Bible is this verse found?
verse: “I can do all things through Christ which strengtheneth me.”

q: In which book of the Bible is this verse found?
verse: “Now faith is the substance of things hoped for, the evidence of things not seen.”

q: In which book of the Bible is this verse found?
verse: “Draw nigh to God, and he will draw nigh to you.”

q: In which book of the Bible is this verse found?
verse: “Beloved, let us love one another: for love is of God.”

q: In which book of the Bible is this verse found?
verse: “Behold, I stand at the door, and knock.”
